commit.message: Removed old comment.
Removed redundant portal site and portal redirect.
Fixed path to mkdocs for serving sites.
Removed weird file (how long have you been there??)
Updated scripts for new build system.
Removed uv requirement from build script.
Remove uv and use traditional python environment.
Added uv package management.
Try fix setup script for Cloudflare Pages.
Add extension to setup script name.
Added a build script.
Added the three main css selectors and removed useless information.
Added intro to CSS and fixed embeds for iframe elements.

Add activeTab to share payload and restore on load

Include activeTab and activePage in fragment and KVS share payloads; restore UI state when loading shared links.
